Birthday

Moments worth celebrating

Your Smile

The kind of light that makes 2025 feel like a better year already.

The Laughter

My favorite soundtrack.

The Support

Always there when I needed it.

Infinite Memories

This is just the beginning of everything we're going to do.

A Letter to You

To the person who makes the world feel smaller and warmer just by being in it. Today isn't just about another year passing—it's about celebrating the incredible person you've become. You are my favorite "everything."

May your day be filled with as much joy as you give to everyone around you. Keep shining, keep being unapologetically you, and know that I'm always your biggest fan.

Make a wish...

DESIGNED FOR YOU • 2025
